predictions.text: By 2026-05-31, Spirit Airlines (SAVE) will either (a) file for Chapter 7 bankruptcy or (b) publicly announce a liquidation plan (asset wind-down and cessation of operations) in an SEC filing or court docket entry.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves YES if Spirit files a Chapter 7 petition (PACER) OR files an 8-K/press release explicitly stating liquidation/wind-down with intent to cease operations. NO otherwise by deadline.
evidence: CNBC reports Spirit Airlines could liquidate as early as this week (sources). https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/15/spirit-airlines-could-liquidate-as-early-as-this-week-sources-say.html
monitoring_signals: Spirit 8-K filings mentioning going concern, restructuring support, DIP financing failure, or wind-down
Bankruptcy filings (PACER) for Spirit/major subsidiaries
Flight schedule reductions, aircraft return notices, vendor payment stoppages
predictions.rationale: Acute liquidity stress and credible liquidation reporting make near-term hard-outcomes plausible, but last-minute rescue financing or merger alternative could still avert Chapter 7/liquidation.

predictions.text: By 2026-05-31, the White House will transmit to the U.S. Senate a formal nomination (PN number on Congress.gov) for a Federal Reserve Chair to succeed Jerome Powell as Chair (nominee can be the same person or a different person).
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if Congress.gov shows a presidential nomination (PN) explicitly for 'Chairman, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System' transmitted by the White House by the deadline. NO otherwise.
evidence: Reporting highlights elevated political pressure on Fed leadership and Powell. https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/15/trump-threatens-to-fire-powell-if-the-fed-chair-doesnt-leave-office-on-his-own.html
monitoring_signals: White House announcements/press briefings on Fed leadership
Senate nominations feed (Congress.gov) for Board of Governors roles
Major financial press reporting on shortlist/vetting
predictions.rationale: With heightened Fed-politics and a defined chair-transition window, a formal nomination by late May is more likely than not, though timing could slip for political/legislative reasons.

predictions.text: By 2026-10-31, the U.S. federal government (DOE/EIA or another agency) will publish in the Federal Register a final or interim final rule (or mandatory survey notice under legal authority) requiring large data centers (≥10 MW connected load or equivalent threshold stated) to report electricity consumption (kWh) at least monthly or quarterly.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if a Federal Register document establishes mandatory reporting for data centers and specifies a reporting cadence (monthly/quarterly) for electricity consumption, with a threshold at or above 10 MW (or clearly comparable). NO otherwise.
evidence: Coverage indicates U.S. regulators moving toward requiring data centers to disclose power bills/usage. https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/15/feds-will-require-data-centers-to-show-their-power-bills/
monitoring_signals: Federal Register notices from DOE/EIA/OMB referencing 'data center' electricity reporting
OMB information-collection approvals (PRA) for new data-center energy surveys
Industry comments from Uptime Institute, hyperscalers, and utilities on reporting burdens
predictions.rationale: Policy momentum exists, but rulemaking can stall on scope, authority, and industry pushback; an interim final rule/mandatory survey is the most likely pathway.

predictions.text: By 2026-11-30, Amazon will report 'Advertising services' revenue year-over-year growth below 10% in at least one quarterly earnings release (10-Q/press release) for a quarter ending after 2026-06-30.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if Amazon quarterly results show Advertising services revenue YoY % growth <10% for any quarter with period-end after 2026-06-30, published by deadline. NO otherwise.
evidence: Sellers reportedly boycott ads after Amazon policy/payment changes, risking ad demand. https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/15/amazon-sellers-boycott-ads-payment-changes.html
monitoring_signals: Seller forum/agency reports of reduced Amazon ad spend (CPC/ROAS deterioration)
Amazon ads take-rate or ad-load commentary on earnings calls
Third-party analytics showing Amazon retail ad pricing softening
predictions.rationale: Ad revenue is diversified and resilient, but a sustained seller pullback or policy backlash could show up as a rare growth deceleration below 10%.

predictions.text: By 2026-12-31, the U.S. Department of Justice will file a court document (or issue a DOJ press release) in the Live Nation/Ticketmaster antitrust matter explicitly seeking a structural remedy (divestiture/spin-off/breakup) rather than only behavioral remedies.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if DOJ publicly states it is seeking divestiture or structural separation in a filing or press release by deadline. NO otherwise.
evidence: A jury found Live Nation illegally monopolized ticketing, setting up a remedies phase. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-15/live-nation-illegally-monopolized-ticketing-market-jury-finds
monitoring_signals: Court scheduling orders for remedies briefing
DOJ Antitrust Division statements on remedies sought
Settlement talks reporting indicating behavioral vs structural remedy
predictions.rationale: A liability finding increases the chance DOJ presses for divestiture, but political/settlement dynamics often lead to behavioral commitments instead.

predictions.text: By 2026-10-15, the BLS CPI release for September 2026 will show the 'Beef and veal' CPI index at or above +12.0% year-over-year (not seasonally adjusted).
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if the BLS CPI detailed tables show 'Beef and veal' (item category) YoY change ≥ +12.0% in the September 2026 CPI report. NO otherwise.
evidence: U.S. cattle prices reached record highs, likely feeding into consumer meat prices. https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/15/beef-cattle-grilling-inflation.html
monitoring_signals: USDA retail beef price series and wholesale boxed beef cutout prices
Cattle inventory reports and drought/forage conditions
Restaurant menu price inflation and grocery scanner data
predictions.rationale: Tight cattle supply and higher live-cattle prices can pass through to retail with lags; 12% YoY is achievable but requires sustained wholesale strength.

predictions.text: By 2026-09-30, the U.S. unemployment rate (U-3) will be at or above 5.0% in at least one monthly BLS Employment Situation release.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if any BLS Employment Situation report for months through September 2026 shows U-3 unemployment rate ≥ 5.0%. NO otherwise by deadline.
evidence: Beige Book reports firms slowing hiring/spending amid Iran-war uncertainty. https://www.marketwatch.com/story/iran-war-is-a-major-source-of-uncertainty-for-u-s-businesses-feds-beige-book-says-52d45d7b
monitoring_signals: Weekly initial and continuing unemployment claims
Job openings (JOLTS) and hiring-rate trends
Layoff announcements and temporary-help employment in payrolls
predictions.rationale: Labor markets can weaken quickly when uncertainty shocks capex/hiring, but a move to 5% still requires broader softening beyond isolated sectors.

predictions.text: By 2026-12-31, Coinbase will publish an official security/engineering post or whitepaper that explicitly commits to adopting post-quantum cryptography (mentions 'post-quantum' and 'NIST') for at least one production security use case (e.g., TLS, key storage, wallet security) and includes a dated deployment milestone in 2027 or earlier.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if an official Coinbase channel (blog/docs) contains the required terms and includes a dated milestone (month/quarter/year) in 2027 or earlier for a production PQC deployment. NO otherwise.
evidence: Quantum-era threats to crypto heighten urgency for quantum-safe cryptography. https://spectrum.ieee.org/quantum-safe-crypto
monitoring_signals: Coinbase security blog and GitHub references to PQC/NIST algorithms
Industry announcements (ETSI/IETF) adopted by exchanges
Major wallet/key-management vendors shipping PQC features
predictions.rationale: Awareness is rising, but production commitments are often delayed due to performance, standards churn, and migration complexity; a dated milestone is a higher bar than generic intent.

predictions.text: By 2026-06-30, the ICE Brent crude front-month futures contract will have at least one daily settlement price at or above $110.00 per barrel.
predictions.verification_criteria: YES if ICE official settlement data shows Brent front-month settlement ≥ $110.00/bbl on any trading day by deadline. NO otherwise.
evidence: Iran-war infrastructure damage and Hormuz disruption risk are highlighted as key oil shock channels. https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/15/iran-war-energy-facilities-refinery-pipeline-lng.html
World Bank warns disruptions can persist for months even after reopening. https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/15/world-bank-ajay-banga-iran-war-hormuz-strait.html
monitoring_signals: Reported incidents or restrictions affecting Gulf exports/shipping insurance
Brent time spreads backwardation steepening and rising OVX
SPR/IEA release announcements and OPEC+ spare capacity messaging
predictions.rationale: A $110 print is plausible with sustained geopolitical risk premium, but significant spare capacity, demand softness, or credible de-escalation could cap prices below that threshold.
